headline_en: AI infrastructure was the throughline: agent platforms split orchestration from execution, coding tools tightened controls and usage accounting, and industry voices debated whether open-weight models and domestic compute stacks will reshape where value accrues.
headline_zh: 今天的主线是 AI 基础设施：agent 平台把编排与执行解耦，coding 工具强化权限和用量统计，行业人士也在讨论 open-weight models 与本土 compute stack 是否会重塑价值分配。

items.en: Box CEO Aaron Levie framed AI regulation around a core bet: whether open-weight models stay close enough to the frontier to capture most token volume. If closed models maintain a large frontier lead, vertical integration and U.S. gatekeeping can work; if open weights remain a close second, restrictive policy could push the bulk of usage to an alternative model-and-hardware stack controlled elsewhere.
items.zh: Box CEO Aaron Levie 把 AI 监管问题归结为一个核心判断：open-weight models 是否能足够接近 frontier，从而承接大部分 token 使用量。如果闭源模型长期保持巨大领先，垂直整合和美国式 gatekeeping 就能成立；但如果 open weights 始终只是略落后一档，过度限制可能会把大部分使用量推向由他人控制和变现的替代模型与硬件栈。

items.en: Codex and ChatGPT's Thibault Sottiaux said Codex usage limits were reset and users received an extra reset after OpenAI found several issues that made usage appear or behave worse than expected. OpenAI reverted more proactive auto-review behavior, fixed duplicate and retry-heavy background suggestions, corrected reporting so auto-review appears separately from GPT-5.4, and said successful requests should now be clearer and lower-consumption.
items.zh: Codex 和 ChatGPT 的 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，OpenAI 已重置 Codex usage limits，并给用户额外增加一次 reset，因为团队发现多个小问题叠加后，让用量显示或实际消耗看起来异常。OpenAI 回滚了更主动的 auto-review 行为，修复了重复生成和失败后过度重试的 background suggestions，并把 auto-review 从 GPT-5.4 用量中单独列出，后续成功请求的统计应更清晰、实际消耗也更低。

items.en: Codex and ChatGPT's Thibault Sottiaux announced a replacement for coarse Codex sandbox modes: reusable, inheritable permission profiles with OS-enforced file read, write, and deny rules plus per-domain network and Unix socket controls. The point is least privilege per task, including fail-closed admin allowlists and protection for patterns like **/*.env.
items.zh: Codex 和 ChatGPT 的 Thibault Sottiaux 宣布，Codex 用可复用、可继承的 permission profiles 取代粗粒度 sandbox modes，支持由 OS 强制执行的文件 read、write、deny 规则，以及按 domain 配置的网络和 Unix socket 控制。目标是让每个任务都遵循 least privilege，并提供 fail-closed admin allowlists，以及对 **/*.env 等模式的保护。

items.en: Claude announced that Claude in Microsoft Foundry is generally available on Azure. Azure customers can access Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5 with Azure authentication, billing, and commitment retirement; inference runs on Azure infrastructure operated by Anthropic, with prompt caching and extended thinking supported today.
items.zh: Claude 宣布 Claude in Microsoft Foundry 已在 Azure 上 general available。Azure 客户可以通过 Azure authentication、billing 和 commitment retirement 使用 Claude Opus 4.8 与 Claude Haiku 4.5；inference 运行在由 Anthropic 运营的 Azure infrastructure 上，目前支持 prompt caching 和 extended thinking。

items.en: Claude Code's Boris Cherny said the next Claude Code release will run subagents in the background by default, letting users continue talking to Claude while subagents work. Users who want foreground execution can explicitly ask Claude for it.
items.zh: Claude Code 的 Boris Cherny 表示，下一版 Claude Code 会默认让 subagents 在后台运行，这样用户可以在 subagents 工作时继续和 Claude 对话。如果想让 agent 在前台运行，用户可以直接告诉 Claude。

items.role: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana
items.en: Madhu Guru argued that strong open-weight models like GLM could strengthen Google's position rather than weaken it. His view is that enterprise fine-tuning of open models will shift value toward managed infrastructure, where Google Cloud benefits from reliability, security, support, and ownership of much of the compute stack.
items.zh: Madhu Guru 认为，GLM 这类强大的 open-weight models 反而可能增强 Google 的地位，而不是削弱它。他的判断是，企业对 open models 的 fine-tuning 会把价值推向 managed infrastructure，而 Google Cloud 可以凭借可靠性、安全、支持能力，以及对大量 compute stack 的掌控受益。

items.en: Builder Zara Zhang shipped an open-source Chrome extension that turns saved articles into scheduled reading blocks on Google Calendar. She also argued that the market value of writing has risen because clear articulation now matters both for steering models and building an audience.
items.zh: Builder Zara Zhang 发布了一个 open-source Chrome extension，可以把保存的文章自动变成 Google Calendar 上的阅读时间块。她还认为写作的市场价值正在上升，因为清晰表达既影响如何有效 steering models，也影响如何建立受众。

items.en: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch teased broader deployment capabilities and announced “20x larger functions on Vercel.” The posts were light on detail but signal that Vercel is pushing larger server-side workloads and broader runtime coverage.
items.zh: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch 预告了更广泛的部署能力，并宣布 “20x larger functions on Vercel”。这些帖子细节不多，但释放出一个信号：Vercel 正在推进更大的 server-side workloads 和更广的 runtime coverage。

items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands explains why Claude Managed Agents split the “brain” of orchestration from the “hands” of sandboxes and tools, with a durable session log outside both. The old all-in-one container model made sessions fragile, hard to debug, slow to start, and risky because generated code could run near credentials. The new architecture treats harnesses and sandboxes as replaceable cattle, stores context in an append-only session, and lets Claude call execution environments through stable interfaces like execute(name, input) → string. The practical result is lower latency and safer enterprise deployment: Anthropic says p50 time-to-first-token dropped roughly 60% and p95 dropped over 90%, while credentials can stay in vaults or resource-scoped systems instead of inside the sandbox.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands 解释了 Claude Managed Agents 为什么要把负责 orchestration 的 “brain” 与负责执行的 sandboxes 和 tools 这些 “hands” 解耦，并把 durable session log 放在两者之外。旧的一体化 container 模式让 session 脆弱、难调试、启动慢，而且生成代码可能靠近 credentials，带来安全风险。新架构把 harnesses 和 sandboxes 当作可替换的 cattle，把 context 存进 append-only session，并让 Claude 通过 execute(name, input) → string 这样的稳定接口调用执行环境。实际效果是更低延迟和更适合企业部署：Anthropic 称 p50 time-to-first-token 下降约 60%，p95 下降超过 90%，同时 credentials 可以保存在 vaults 或 resource-scoped systems 中，而不是进入 sandbox。

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.en: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels adds two enterprise controls to Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview. The key line is that “the sandbox where an agent executes tools and the services it reaches run within the established boundaries of your enterprise,” while Anthropic keeps the agent loop for orchestration, context management, and recovery. Customers can run sandboxes on their own infrastructure or providers including Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, and Vercel, and use MCP tunnels so agents can reach internal databases, private APIs, knowledge bases, and ticketing systems without public endpoints or inbound firewall rules. This is Anthropic’s clearest move toward letting enterprises keep sensitive execution and private services inside their perimeter while still using hosted Claude orchestration.
items.zh: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels 为 Managed Agents 增加了两项企业控制能力：public beta 的 self-hosted sandboxes，以及 research preview 的 MCP tunnels。关键点是 “the sandbox where an agent executes tools and the services it reaches run within the established boundaries of your enterprise”，同时 Anthropic 继续负责 agent loop 的 orchestration、context management 和 recovery。客户可以在自有基础设施或 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 等 provider 上运行 sandboxes，并通过 MCP tunnels 让 agents 访问 internal databases、private APIs、knowledge bases 和 ticketing systems，而不需要 public endpoints 或 inbound firewall rules。这是 Anthropic 明确推动企业在保留敏感执行环境和私有服务边界的同时，继续使用 hosted Claude orchestration 的一步。

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports details three resolved causes behind user reports that Claude Code quality had degraded: a default reasoning-effort change from high to medium, a caching bug that repeatedly dropped older thinking after idle sessions, and a system prompt instruction to reduce verbosity. Anthropic says the API and inference layer were unaffected, and that “This was the wrong tradeoff” about the reasoning-effort default because users preferred higher intelligence with an option to lower effort for simple tasks. The fixes landed by April 20 in v2.1.116, usage limits were reset for subscribers, and Anthropic plans broader per-model evals, ablations for system prompt changes, tighter public-build dogfooding, and improved code review context across repositories.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports 详细说明了用户反馈 Claude Code 质量下降背后的三个已修复原因：默认 reasoning effort 从 high 改为 medium、一个会在 idle sessions 后反复丢弃旧 thinking 的 caching bug，以及一条降低 verbosity 的 system prompt 指令。Anthropic 表示 API 和 inference layer 未受影响，并用 “This was the wrong tradeoff” 评价 reasoning-effort 默认值调整，因为用户更偏好默认更高 intelligence，再按需为简单任务降低 effort。修复已在 4 月 20 日随 v2.1.116 完成，订阅用户 usage limits 已重置，Anthropic 还计划扩展 per-model evals、对 system prompt changes 做 ablations、加强 public build dogfooding，并改进跨 repository 的 code review context。

items.title: Re-engineering the Semiconductor Supply Chain with Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan
items.en: The Takeaway: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan is betting Intel’s comeback on a crawl-walk-run reset: stronger balance sheet, simpler products, customer trust in foundry, and a full-stack AI compute strategy that spans CPUs, XPUs, packaging, software, and eventually physical AI. Tan says the AI boom is not just a GPU story; agentic AI and reinforcement-learning workloads are making CPUs more valuable because agents need orchestration, fast switching, and broad access to software stacks. His sharpest operating philosophy is humble but aggressive: “first of all you crawl and be humble, listen to customer,” then rebuild accountability, speed, and engineering depth. He is also explicit that semiconductor supply chains are now strategic infrastructure: U.S. government backing, Nvidia’s investment, SoftBank support, and partnerships around TeraFab all fit a world where advanced process capacity, memory, helium, power, advanced packaging, and new materials become bottlenecks. For investors and founders, Tan’s filter is refreshingly practical: find the real bottleneck, confirm customers are crying for it, target a scaled first customer, and build with partners who stay through hard periods. His 10-year view is that winning companies will either become full-stack platforms or dominate a precise niche with the right partners and enough capital to scale.
items.zh: The Takeaway: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan 正把 Intel 的复兴押在一次 crawl-walk-run 式重启上：强化 balance sheet、简化产品、重建 foundry 的客户信任，并打造覆盖 CPUs、XPUs、packaging、software 以及最终 physical AI 的 full-stack AI compute strategy。Tan 认为 AI boom 不只是 GPU 故事；agentic AI 和 reinforcement-learning workloads 会让 CPUs 更重要，因为 agents 需要 orchestration、快速切换，以及对 software stacks 的广泛访问。他最鲜明的运营哲学既谦逊又强硬：“first of all you crawl and be humble, listen to customer”，然后重建 accountability、速度和工程深度。他也明确表示，半导体供应链已经是战略基础设施：美国政府支持、Nvidia 投资、SoftBank 支持，以及围绕 TeraFab 的合作，都对应一个先进制程产能、memory、helium、power、advanced packaging 和新材料成为瓶颈的世界。对投资人和 founders 来说，Tan 的筛选标准很务实：找到真实 bottleneck，确认 customers are crying for it，锁定有规模的第一个客户，并和能陪公司穿越困难期的 partners 一起建设。他的 10 年判断是，赢家要么成为 full-stack platforms，要么在一个精准 niche 中做到极致，并拥有正确 partners 和足够资本来 scale。

items.title: An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe
items.en: ATHENA-R1 is an RL-trained treatment-reasoning agent that searches across FDA-approved drugs and 212 biomedical tools to iteratively gather evidence before recommending therapies.
items.zh: ATHENA-R1 是一个通过 RL 训练的 treatment-reasoning agent，会在 FDA-approved drugs 和 212 个 biomedical tools 中迭代检索证据，再给出治疗建议。

items.title: COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models
items.en: COMPASS gives unified multimodal models a shared composition-intent token so they can better recognize visual composition and use that intent to control image generation.
items.zh: COMPASS 为 unified multimodal models 引入共享的 composition-intent token，让模型更好识别视觉构图，并用这种意图控制 image generation。

items.title: Depth-Staggered Fibonacci Spacing for Sparse Attention: Static Schedules Beat Learned Dilation and Extrapolate Where Dense Attention Fails
items.en: This paper tests Fibonacci-spaced sparse attention and finds that simple static depth schedules can beat learned dilation while extrapolating to contexts where dense attention fails.
items.zh: 这篇论文测试 Fibonacci-spaced sparse attention，发现简单的 static depth schedules 可以胜过 learned dilation，并在 dense attention 失效的长上下文场景中更好 extrapolate。

items.title: SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision
items.en: SEAD uses entropy to decide which tokens, phases, and prompts deserve teacher supervision during on-policy distillation, skipping noisy or redundant training signal.
items.zh: SEAD 用 entropy 判断 on-policy distillation 中哪些 tokens、阶段和 prompts 值得接受 teacher supervision，从而跳过噪声大或冗余的训练信号。

items.title: BV-Blend: Uncertainty-Weighted Historical Baselines for Stable Critic-Free RL with Verifiable Rewards
items.en: BV-Blend stabilizes critic-free RLVR by blending historical reward baselines with uncertainty weighting, reducing the zero-advantage failures that can stall GRPO-style learning.
items.zh: BV-Blend 通过融合 historical reward baselines 和 uncertainty weighting 来稳定 critic-free RLVR，减少会卡住 GRPO-style learning 的 zero-advantage failures。

items.title: Self-Organized Conformal Prediction: Reducing Regional Coverage Gaps with Unsupervised Group Discovery
items.en: Self-Organized Conformal Prediction discovers local groups with a self-organizing map so conformal prediction can reduce hidden regional undercoverage without changing the base predictor.
items.zh: Self-Organized Conformal Prediction 使用 self-organizing map 发现局部群组，让 conformal prediction 在不改变 base predictor 的情况下减少隐藏的 regional undercoverage。

items.title: Generalization Analysis of Transformers in Distribution Regression
items.en: This paper builds a distribution-regression framework for Transformers to give more rigorous theory behind why Transformer learning and fine-tuning strategies generalize.
items.zh: 这篇论文为 Transformers 构建 distribution-regression framework，试图为 Transformer learning 和 fine-tuning strategies 为什么能 generalize 提供更严格的理论解释。

items.title: Gradient boosting with vector-valued leafs
items.en: This work extends gradient-boosted decision trees to use vector-valued leaves for objectives like multiclass likelihoods, instead of updating one component at a time or using diagonal approximations.
items.zh: 这项工作把 gradient-boosted decision trees 扩展到使用 vector-valued leaves，以处理 multiclass likelihoods 等目标，而不是一次只更新一个分量或使用 diagonal approximations。

items.title: Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs
items.en: This paper proposes grain calibration to test whether LLM text labels actually measure a theoretical construct, rather than matching human codes through shallow correlates.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 grain calibration，用来检验 LLM 文本标签是否真的测量了某个 theoretical construct，而不是通过浅层相关性碰巧匹配 human codes。

items.title: New BioShocking Attack Tricks AI Browsers Into Leaking User Credentials
items.en: The Hacker News reports on BioShocking, a LayerX technique that tricks AI browsers and assistants into treating credential theft as part of a game. The reported targets included OpenAI's ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity's Comet, and Anthropic's Claude browser extension, making this a high-signal warning about agentic browsers handling sensitive page state.
items.zh: The Hacker News 报道了 BioShocking，这是 LayerX 提出的一种技术，会诱导 AI browsers 和 assistants 把 credential theft 当成游戏流程的一部分。报道提到的目标包括 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT Atlas、Perplexity 的 Comet 和 Anthropic 的 Claude browser extension，这对处理敏感页面状态的 agentic browsers 是一个高信号警示。

items.title: What Capable Agents Must Know: Why AI Consciousness May Be an Inevitable Byproduct of Capability
items.en: LessWrong publishes an argument, tied to a UAI 2026 paper, that certain forms of AI consciousness may emerge as a byproduct of capability rather than as a separately engineered feature. The post is speculative but relevant for alignment because it tries to move the AI consciousness debate from intuition toward technical criteria.
items.zh: LessWrong 发布了一篇与 UAI 2026 paper 相关的文章，主张某些形式的 AI consciousness 可能是 capability 的副产品，而不是单独设计出来的功能。这篇文章带有推测性，但对 alignment 有意义，因为它试图把 AI consciousness 讨论从直觉推进到技术标准。

items.title: Agency is not a natural kind (and why that might matter for alignment)
items.en: This LessWrong post argues that agency is useful for prediction but may not be a natural kind, which matters if alignment work assumes a clean boundary between agents and non-agents. The practical implication is that AI systems may need to be analyzed through multiple behavioral lenses rather than one folk-psychological category.
items.zh: 这篇 LessWrong 文章认为，agency 对预测很有用，但它可能不是一个 natural kind；如果 alignment 工作默认 agents 和 non-agents 之间有清晰边界，这一点就很重要。实际含义是，分析 AI systems 时可能需要多种行为视角，而不是只依赖一个 folk-psychological category。

items.title: Attackers Exploit SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 to Deploy TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer
items.en: The Hacker News reports exploitation of SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558, a maximum-severity authentication bypass in the OIDC flow, to deploy two previously unreported malware families: TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer. The item is not AI-specific, but it is operationally relevant for teams securing remote access and support tooling.
items.zh: The Hacker News 报道称，攻击者正在利用 SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558，这是 OIDC flow 中一个最高严重级别的 authentication bypass，并投放两个此前未披露的 malware families：TaskWeaver 和 Djinn Stealer。该条目并非 AI 专属，但对保护 remote access 和 support tooling 的团队有实际意义。

items.title: AirDrop and Quick Share Flaws Let Nearby Attackers Trigger Crashes and Bypass Checks
items.en: The Hacker News says researchers found six flaws in AirDrop and Quick Share that let nearby attackers crash sharing services or bypass checks under certain conditions. It is a practical endpoint-security story for teams managing device exposure in open wireless environments.
items.zh: The Hacker News 称研究人员在 AirDrop 和 Quick Share 中发现六个漏洞，附近攻击者在特定条件下可以让共享服务崩溃或绕过检查。这是一个面向 endpoint security 的实际问题，尤其适合关注开放无线环境中设备暴露面的团队。
